name: Equitas Selfe Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: 2 chosen accelerated categories: apparel, dining, grocery, utility, or taxi
rewards.displayRate: 10 Reward Points / Rs 100 spent (on 2 chosen categories)

domestic: 1 complimentary domestic airport lounge access per calendar quarter (4 per year).

exclusions: Fuel transactions (surcharge waiver only, no reward points)
additionalBenefits: Limited-period first-year-free offer currently live, excluding GST
Choice of 2 complimentary OTT/brand memberships from: Amazon Prime, Jio Hotstar, Sony LIV, Zee5, or Discovery+ (claim within 90 days of issuance)
Choice of card style: Regular plastic, eco-friendly Green (recycled plastic), or premium Metal variant
Flexible billing date: Choose 12th, 16th, or 20th of every month
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between Rs 500 and Rs 3,000
Up to 50 days interest-free credit period on regular purchases
additionalDetails: Reward points redeemable on Equitas Xchange portal (xchange.equitasbank.com) for products, vouchers, and travel

salaried: Minimum annual income: Rs 5 – 18 lakhs (approximate range)
Subject to Equitas Small Finance Bank credit approval
selfEmployed: Subject to Equitas Small Finance Bank credit approval

internalNotes: The 10 RP accelerated row applies only to 2 self-chosen categories (from apparel, dining, grocery, utility, taxi), not all of them at once, so it uses category 'partner merchants' rather than broad dining/grocery/utility/lifestyle. acceleratedShare 0.5 on dining/grocery/utilities blends the accelerated rate against base for the portion of those categories the cardholder selects; online is 0 (general online is not a choosable accelerated category).
Card details audited against the live official Equitas Selfe Credit Card page on 2026-06-15.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.
The live page explicitly shows 5X rewards on 2 self-chosen categories and a base earn rate of 2 RP per Rs 100, so the accelerated row is modeled as 10 RP per Rs 100 on the two selected categories.
The live page explicitly confirms a renewal fee waiver on Rs 2.4 lakh annual spends in the previous anniversary year and a limited-period first-year-free offer excluding GST.

Xchange redemption value is spend-tiered via the Equitas Privilege Program (common to all 3 Equitas cards): 1 RP = Rs 0.35 at Blue (base), rising to Rs 0.50 (Gold, Rs 40k/mo), Rs 0.75 (Platinum, Rs 60k/mo), and Rs 1.00 (Diamond, Rs 1L/mo) — a 3.5% to 10% valueback on the 5X categories. Modeled via redemption.pointValueTiers for ranking; ecosystemValue 1 shows the top-tier headline (PowerMiles convention). The flat Rs 0.35 captured in the 2026-06-15 audit is the Blue/base tier only. Silver (Rs 20k/mo) value is unconfirmed, modeled as staying at Blue until Gold.
Metal card variant may carry additional charges; confirm with bank at time of issuance.
Finance charges: 3.75% per month. Cash advance fee: 2.5% or Rs 250 whichever is higher.
